items.situation: two friends deciding whether to buy concert tickets now or wait

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you seen how fast tickets for the fall concert are selling? I keep debating whether to buy now or wait for prices to drop.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, prices for that venue almost never drop. The cheap seats sell out first and what's left gets pricier.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's what I was afraid of. But I don't want to commit money I might need for textbooks.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Fair point. Maybe just grab one ticket now instead of the whole group package.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That sounds like a reasonable compromise. I'll do that tonight before I talk myself out of it.

questions.stem: What is the main topic of the conversation?

options.A: Whether to buy concert tickets now or wait
options.C: Planning a group trip to a concert venue
options.D: Comparing seating options at different venues

questions.explanation: 两人主要在讨论是现在就买演唱会门票，还是再等等看价格会不会下降。B项只是女生提到的次要顾虑；C项讲座未提及集体出行计划；D项对比座位选项范围过窄，非对话核心。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Wait until prices drop before buying anything
options.B: Buy the full group package immediately
options.C: Buy a single ticket that same night
options.D: Ask her parents for money to buy tickets

questions.explanation: 女生说她当晚就会去买一张票，采纳了男生"先买一张而非整套团购"的建议。A项是她原本担心但被男生说服放弃的想法；B项与最终决定相反；D项对话中完全没有提及。

items.situation: two roommates working out a fair quiet-hours schedule

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Can we figure out quiet hours? I've got early classes and you're usually still up gaming at midnight.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, that's fair. What if I keep headphones on after ten and save the speaker for weekends?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That would help a lot. I could also give you a heads-up on nights I have an actual early exam.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sounds good. Let's just check in with each other if the schedule ever stops working.

questions.stem: What is the main topic of the conversation?

options.A: Deciding who pays for the room's electricity bill
options.B: Working out a quiet-hours arrangement between roommates
options.C: Complaining about a neighbor's loud music
options.D: Planning to buy new gaming equipment

questions.explanation: 两位室友在协商一个双方都能接受的安静时段安排。A、C两项对话完全未提及；D项只是提到耳机，并非购买新设备的计划。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the roommates' relationship?

options.A: They rarely speak to each other about problems
options.B: They plan to request a room change soon
options.C: They have had this same argument many times before
options.D: They are willing to compromise to accommodate each other

questions.explanation: 两人都主动提出让步方案（戴耳机、提前告知考试），说明彼此愿意为对方妥协。A项与对话中主动沟通的情形相反；B、C两项对话都没有依据。

items.situation: two students planning what cheese and food to buy for a dinner party

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: For the dinner party, I was thinking we get a soft cheese, a hard one, and maybe some crackers to go with them.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That works. Should we get a baguette too, or is that too much bread on top of the crackers?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Let's skip the baguette then and grab some grapes instead, since they pair really well with cheese.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good call. I'll grab the grapes and crackers if you handle picking out the cheese.

questions.stem: According to the conversation, what will the man buy?
questions.explanation: 男生明确说"I'll grab the grapes and crackers"，由女生负责挑选奶酪。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the baguette?

options.A: They decided not to buy it
options.B: The store does not sell it
options.C: The man already bought it earlier
options.D: It was the woman's favorite item

questions.explanation: 两人商量后决定用葡萄代替法棍，即放弃购买法棍。B、C两项对话中没有依据；D项与决定放弃购买相矛盾。

items.situation: two friends recommending a podcast to each other

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You have to check out this podcast I just started, it's about unsolved historical mysteries from around the world.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I've actually been looking for something new to listen to. Is it more storytelling or interview-based?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Mostly storytelling, with a narrator walking you through the evidence of each case in a lot of detail.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That sounds right up my alley. I'll download the first few episodes tonight and give it a try.

questions.stem: What is the main topic of the conversation?

options.B: Debating which podcast app is best
options.C: Planning to attend a live podcast recording
options.D: Recommending a podcast about historical mysteries

questions.explanation: 女生向男生推荐一档讲述历史悬案的播客节目。A项对话未提及纪录片；B、C两项对话中都没有依据。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do next?

options.A: Ask the woman to record an episode with him
options.B: Download and listen to the podcast
options.D: Wait for the woman's opinion of later episodes

questions.explanation: 男生明确说"I'll download the first few episodes tonight and give it a try"。A、D两项对话中没有依据；C项与男生表现出的兴趣相矛盾。

items.situation: two students talking about a new restaurant downtown and which dish to try

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you tried that new restaurant downtown yet? Everyone keeps saying the noodle dish there is absolutely amazing.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not yet, but I heard from a coworker that their dumplings are actually even better than the noodles, so now I'm curious.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? I might just order both of those then and split everything with you so we can compare.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Works for me. Let's go this weekend together before the place gets too crowded and we can't get a table.

questions.stem: According to the conversation, what have people said about the noodle dish?

options.D: It is only available on weekends

questions.explanation: 女生说"everyone keeps saying the noodle dish there is absolutely amazing"。

questions.stem: What will the speakers most likely do this weekend?

options.B: Avoid the restaurant due to crowds
options.D: Order delivery instead of dining in

questions.explanation: 男生提议"Let's go this weekend together before the place gets too crowded"，两人计划一起去这家新餐厅。A、D两项对话中没有依据；B项与他们打算尽早前往的计划相反。
